hypothesis: Two bugs in _get_campaign_waves() produce false-positive stall alerts (regex field truncation + alias/rename blind spot). Fixing both reduces spurious wave_2_stalls. H4: COMMIT reservation (S396-S401) achieves >0% danger-zone targeting rate in S401-S403.
expect: Fix reduces wave_2_stalls 7→4 (3 resolved frontiers removed). H4 targeting rate >0% for S401-S403.

bug_1_regex.root_cause: Comma is value separator within frontier field; old regex stopped at first comma truncating multi-frontier lanes (e.g. F-PSY2,F-PSY3 → only F-PSY2 seen)

bug_2_alias.fix: _get_domain_resolved_frontier_ids() — reads ## Resolved sections of all domain FRONTIER.md files
bug_2_alias.root_cause: F-CC2 renamed F-CRYPTO2 and resolved S302, leaving only ABANDONED SWARM-LANES entries; resolved=any(MERGED) was False → permanent false stall
false_positives_removed: F-CC2 (alias for F-CRYPTO2, resolved via domain FRONTIER.md)

verdict: CONFIRMED — Both bugs fixed, 3 false positives removed. H4 targeting rate 66.7% (S401: 0%, S402: SOC, S403: SOC) — reservation mechanism working. Stalls now reflect genuine 2-wave valley-of-death frontiers only.
diff: Expected 7→4 (3 removed) — CONFIRMED exactly. Expected H4 >0% — CONFIRMED at 66.7%.
lesson: L-859 (written by concurrent S402/S403 session — covers both bugs)
